Jane Smith
Senior Software Engineer
jane.smith@example.com | (555) 123-4567

Summary
-------
Senior engineer with 8 years of experience building distributed systems on
AWS. Strong background in Python, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL.

Skills
------
Python, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, PostgreSQL, Redis, Terraform, Go

Experience
----------
Acme Inc — Staff Engineer — 2020 - present
- Led migration from monolith to 40 microservices on Kubernetes
- Reduced p99 latency from 800ms to 120ms and cut AWS bill by 35%
- Mentored a team of 4 junior engineers

BetaCorp — Senior Engineer — 2016 - 2020
- Built data pipeline processing 50M events per day on AWS
- Owned the on-call rotation and reduced incidents by 60%

Education
---------
B.S. Computer Science, State University, 2014

Certifications
--------------

Certified Kubernetes Administrator
